tools.name: trustpilot_reviews
tools.description:
Get Trustpilot reviews for a company. Returns ratings, review text, dates.

Args:
    company: Company name or Trustpilot URL slug (e.g. 'amazon.com')
    max_results: Max reviews (default 20)

tools.name: g2_reviews
tools.description:
Get G2 software reviews. Returns ratings, pros, cons, use cases.

Args:
    product: Software product name (e.g. 'Salesforce')
    max_results: Max reviews (default 20)

tools.name: yelp_reviews
tools.description:
Get Yelp business reviews. Returns ratings, review text, photos.

Args:
    business: Business name or type (e.g. 'pizza')
    location: City (optional, e.g. 'Chicago')
    max_results: Max results (default 20)
